sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n57033" key="*kexhnw/dhs" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">Κεχην-ώδης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ες</itype>, <sense id="n57033.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">forming a hiatus</tr_>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">τὸ κ.</foreign> Sch.D.T.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0019.tlg002.perseus-grc1:p.146" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.146</biblScope> </bibl> H.</sense> </entryFree>
